author: gb9t
content: Iter 118 result: net/sched/sch-cbs.md (Credit-Based Shaper IEEE 802.1Qav AVB - sch_cbs.c ~578 lines; per-qdisc credits counter signed-bytes + idleslope refill rate + sendslope=idleslope-port_rate negative drain rate + hicredit/locredit caps + soft mode kernel-managed credits + offload mode TC_SETUP_QDISC_CBS HW shaper + cbs_dequeue_soft credit-gate + watchdog_schedule on negative-credits with delay_from_credits + max_interference_size deadline budget + AVB classes A/B 1ms latency + TSN scheduled traffic) + virt/kvm/binary-stats.md (KVM binary-stats interface - binary_stats.c ~144 lines; KVM_GET_STATS_FD on VM-fd or vCPU-fd returns anon-inode read-only fd + struct kvm_stats_header with id/desc/data offsets + struct kvm_stats_desc with flags type CUMULATIVE/INSTANT/PEAK/LINEAR_HIST/LOG_HIST + unit NONE/BYTES/SECONDS/CYCLES/BOOLEAN + base POW10/POW2 + exponent + bucket_size + per-VM stats mmu_shadow_zapped/mmu_unsync/etc + per-vCPU stats halt_exits/exits/pf_fixed/halt_poll_success_ns histogram + libkvm-stats userspace ABI). 186 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/sched/sch-etf.md (Earliest TxTime First) + virt/kvm/coalesced-mmio-impl.md or pivot.
